title: Best time to buy and sell stock with transaction fees

content.problemStatement: We are given an array Arr[] of length n. It represents the price of a stock on ‘n’ days. The following guidelines need to be followed: We can buy and sell the stock any number of times.In order to sell the stock, we need to first buy it on the same or any previous day.We can’t buy a stock again after buying it once. In other words, we first buy a stock and then sell it. After selling we can buy and sell again. But we can’t sell before buying and can’t buy before selling any previously bought stock.After every transaction, there is a transaction fee (‘fee’) associated with it.
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer 'n' representing the number of days. The second line contains 'n' space-separated integers representing the stock prices for each day. The third line contains an integer 'fee' representing the transaction fee.
content.outputFormat: The maximum possible profit after a series of transactions.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use dynamic programming to track the maximum profit at each day, considering whether we have a stock or not.
